name: 11 — Upsell Automation

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ From: 'hello@mysitehq.com.au', To: $json.email, Subject: $json.offer_subject, HtmlBody: $json.offer_html, TextBody: $json.sms_text, MessageStream: 'outbound' }) }}

nodes.name: Has Phone for Upsell SMS?
nodes.notes: Only send SMS for milestone and renewal triggers — plateau gets email only to avoid annoyance

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Build Upsell Offer').first().json.lead_id, event_type: 'upsell.triggered', event_data: { trigger_type: $('Build Upsell Offer').first().json.trigger_type, email_sent: !!$('Build Upsell Offer').first().json.email, sms_sent: !!$('Build Upsell Offer').first().json.phone }, source: 'n8n' }) }}

notes: Triggered by workflow 10 (monthly reporting) or directly via executeWorkflow. trigger_type must be 'plateau', 'milestone', or 'renewal'. 30-day deduplication prevents spamming the same lead with multiple upsell attempts per month. SMS is sent for milestone and renewal triggers only. The upgrade URLs (mysitehq.com.au/upgrade/*) must be built as actual pages that redirect to Stripe Checkout — these are frontend pages not covered in this workflow spec.
